debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

    rcases hU with ⟨f, hf⟩

  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩

  constructor

  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩

    apply hf

  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩
    exact ⟨f, ⟨hf, by

      rcases (Classical.decEq (range f) (Univ Nat)) with hEq | hNeq
      · exact hEq
      · exfalso

        apply ext
        intro n
        constructor
        · intro hn
          trivial
        · intro _
          refine ⟨Classical.choice ?_, ?_⟩
          · classical
            have : ∃ u : U, f u = n := by
              classical
              by_contra hcontra
              have : n ∉ range f := by
                intro hnrange
                rcases hnrange with ⟨u, rfl⟩
                exact hcontra ⟨u, rfl⟩
              have : n ∈ Univ Nat := by trivial
              have : n ∈ range f := by
                simpa [hEq] using this
              exact this.elim
            exact this
          · classical
            simpa using (Classical.choice_spec (by
              classical
              have : ∃ u : U, f u = n := by
                classical
                by_contra hcontra
                have : n ∉ range f := by
                  intro hnrange
                  rcases hnrange with ⟨u, rfl⟩
                  exact hcontra ⟨u, rfl⟩
                have : n ∈ Univ Nat := by trivial
                have : n ∈ range f := by
                  simpa [hEq] using this
                exact this.elim
              exact this))⟩⟩

constructor
  · intro hU
    rcases hU with ⟨f, hf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    exact one_to_one_of_inverse f Nat U (inv f) (by simpa [left_inverse] using hf)
  · rintro ⟨f, hf⟩
    exact ctble_of_inj_to_nat f hf

  · intro hU

      intro n
      classical
      by_cases h : ∃ u : U, f u = n
      · rcases h with ⟨u, hu⟩
        refine ⟨u, hu⟩
      · exact ⟨Classical.choice (by
            have : Nonempty U := by
              by_contra hne
              have : (U → Nat) := fun u => False.elim (hne ⟨u⟩)
              exact False.elim (h (by
                cases Classical.choice (show Nonempty Nat from ⟨0⟩) with
                | _ => trivial)) ), ?_⟩⟩⟩

    rcases hU with ⟨f, hf⟩
    refine ⟨f, ?_⟩
    intro x1 x2 hfx
